error_signature: Something went wrong. Please try again!
title: Google Sheets OAuth2 API credential error
symptom: When attempting to authenticate Google Sheets OAuth2 credentials, the user receives a message stating 'Something went wrong. Please try again!'. This occurs consistently despite multiple attempts.
not_this_if: Error does not occur during authentication
root_cause: The error is caused by the 'ClearURLs' browser add-on in Firefox, which removes tracking elements from URLs. This can interfere with the OAuth2 authentication process, leading to failure in establishing a connection.
fix_steps: Retry the authentication process for Google Sheets OAuth2 credentials
agent_instruction: Disable the 'ClearURLs' add-on in your browser and attempt to authenticate again.
